SELECT 4 NOT IN (SELECT num FROM Numbers);
SELECT 5 NOT IN (SELECT num FROM Numbers WHERE num < 5);
SELECT 4 NOT IN (1, 2, (SELECT MAX(num) FROM Numbers));
SELECT 'D' NOT IN (SELECT letter FROM Letters);
SELECT 'A' NOT IN (SELECT letter FROM Letters WHERE letter <> 'B');
SELECT 10 NOT IN (SELECT num FROM Numbers UNION SELECT 10);
SELECT 5 NOT IN (SELECT num FROM Numbers) AND 7 NOT IN (SELECT num FROM MoreNumbers);
SELECT 9 NOT IN (SELECT num FROM Numbers INTERSECT SELECT num FROM MoreNumbers);
SELECT 'E' NOT IN (SELECT letter FROM Letters WHERE letter NOT IN ('A', 'B', 'C'));
SELECT 1 NOT IN (SELECT num FROM Numbers WHERE num NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 3);
